properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v3 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who makes the sun to rise And brings the earth new life in every beam? Jesus it is You. Who turns the day to night And watches me as I begin to dream? Jesus it is You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Who brings me food for my table? Who cares for all of my needs? Who walks the road with me, Has grown with me through all that I have been? Jesus it is You, Jesus it is You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I lift my hands I bring my song All of my days All of my rights All of my wrongs

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I offer my life Here and beyond To the One thing true Jesus it is You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Who sees my brokenness And carries me when I am frail and weak Jesus it is You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Who tells the storm to rest When I am overwhelmed and cannot speak? Jesus it is You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Who wears my guilt on His shoulders? Who holds my heart in His hands? Who takes my thoughts and fears and hangs them on the arms of calvary? Jesus it is You, Jesus it is You,

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I offer my life Here and beyond To the One thing true Jesus It is You

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: To the One thing true Jesus It is You
